name: Credit Repair Gurus Phoenix AZ
description_short: Go Clean Credit offers personalized credit repair and restoration services in Phoenix, AZ, using a client-centered approach that combines dispute resolution with credit education.
description_long:
Go Clean Credit has been operating since 2003 as a credit repair service headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona. The company positions itself as a trusted provider of credit restoration services, having helped thousands of customers over two decades. Their business model centers on challenging negative information on credit reports and guiding clients toward financial recovery.

Go Clean Credit offers multiple service tiers to accommodate different budgets and needs. Their programs include a free DIY credit repair app for self-directed consumers, a "Positive Credit Boost" entry-level option starting at $99 per month, and full-service credit repair packages. They advertise fixed-price programs designed to resolve credit issues in as little as 5 months, along with specialized programs for consumers who have experienced foreclosures or short sales. The company also offers free attorney support qualification assessments and premium credit monitoring services.

The company distinguishes itself through its emphasis on client education paired with repair services. Go Clean Credit explicitly states they use a "client-centered approach" and tailor programs to individual situations rather than applying a one-size-fits-all model. They offer free initial consultations and claim the ability to boost credit scores within 30 to 60 days in some cases. The company also emphasizes no-cost attorney support eligibility for qualifying customers.

Based on available information, Go Clean Credit appears to be a legitimate, established local provider with transparent pricing starting at $99/month. However, the website lacks specific details about average results, dispute success rates, or detailed testimonials that would allow independent verification of claims. The vague promise of credit boosts in 30-60 days should be viewed cautiously, as credit repair timelines vary significantly by individual circumstances.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Operating since 2003 with stated history of helping thousands of clients
Transparent entry-level pricing starting at $99 per month
Offers free DIY credit repair app alternative for budget-conscious consumers
Provides free attorney support qualification assessment for eligible clients
Specializes in tailored programs for specific situations (foreclosures, short sales, debt resolution)
Includes credit education components alongside repair services
Free initial consultation available by phone or appointment request
cons: Website makes vague claims about 30-60 day credit boosts without specific documentation or success rates
Limited specific testimonials or case studies provided on the website
No detailed information about average number of items successfully disputed or removed
Website does not clearly disclose the company's licensing status or regulatory compliance details
The comparison list on their homepage includes competitors, potentially diluting their brand positioning
best_for: Phoenix-area residents seeking in-person or local credit repair services
Budget-conscious consumers willing to start with the free DIY app before committing to paid services
Individuals with recent negative events (foreclosure, short sale) needing specialized programs
Consumers who qualify for no-cost attorney support and want legal assistance
diagnosis: Go Clean Credit is best suited for Phoenix-area residents seeking affordable, locally-based credit repair with flexible options ranging from DIY to full-service support. The main caveat is that their website lacks independently verifiable results data, specific success rates, or detailed client testimonials—making it difficult to assess actual performance before committing to paid services.
services: Credit dispute and negative item removal
Specialized foreclosure and short-sale recovery programs
Free initial phone or appointment consultation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
